title: Part Two: Christmas Hero Episode: Aaron Swartz
description:
Margaret and Robert conclude our Christmas episode and yet another year of this fucking podcast.

CBP is detaining thousands of migrants, including children and the elderly, in the desert without food, water or shelter when overnight temperatures drop below freezing. Support the mutual aid groups helping them:

tinyurl.com/borderaidgfm and/or https://www.gofundme.com/jacumba-migrant-camps

 

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
